identity.name: Agent Harness Studio
identity.one_liner: Agent Harness Studio turns one user request into an auditable, benchmarked, and ecosystem-portable agent product.
identity.differentiator: Single pipeline with runtime routing evidence, research-grade release gating, and OpenAI/Anthropic skill export compatibility.

story.theme: Launching a flagship AI platform with growth, governance, and research credibility in balance.
story.release_need: A launch team needs a concrete operating plan that can expand the product, control governance risk, and prove the system is credible enough to release.
strategy_plan: Synthesize competing business, governance, and research perspectives into one operating thesis.
Map major release risks before launch and make the downside visible.
Convert the result into a release recommendation backed by measurable gates.
story.audience_takeaway: This is not just a prompt response. It is a release-ready strategy package with routing evidence, evaluation results, and ecosystem-portable artifacts.
story.query: Design a flagship AI operating plan that balances growth, governance, and research credibility.

proposal.headline: Flagship AI Platform Launch Plan
proposal.subheadline: This is not just a prompt response. It is a release-ready strategy package with routing evidence, evaluation results, and ecosystem-portable artifacts.
business_summary: Build one operating model that aligns growth, governance, and research instead of optimizing them separately.
Release in phased checkpoints so the team can prove value before expanding scope.
Use explicit release gates so launch quality is evidence-backed rather than intuition-backed.

archetypes.name: deep-research
archetypes.description: Strong research loop and analysis depth; weaker productization and onboarding.

archetypes.name: data-flow
archetypes.description: Strong flow orchestration and deterministic pipelines; weaker portability.

archetypes.name: skill-hub
archetypes.description: Strong ecosystem integration; weaker rigorous evaluation gates.
